title: crataegus pinnatifida var. typica
intro: Crataegus pinnatifida var. typica, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally used in Chinese medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits associated with Crataegus pinnatifida var. typica include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the berries and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
